stemHtml: In accordance with OPS regulations, for an aeroplane with a turbine engine, the operator shall have a fuel policy including a final reserve fuel to fly above destination aerodrome elevation in standard conditions:

options.a: 30 minutes at holding speed at 1500 ft
options.b: 30 minutes at long range speed at holding altitude
options.c: 45 minutes at cruising speed at holding altitude
options.d: 45 minutes at holding speed at 1500 ft
